resources.string:
This app is a lightweight offline encyclopedia for Hokm.

Version 1 focuses on fast startup, clean text pages, and simple navigation.

Future versions can add images, diagrams, and optional media.

Settings page (starter version).

In this first release, no configurable options are enabled yet.

Future updates can include font size, dark mode, and language preferences.

Hokm Rules (short starter text).

1) Hokm is usually played by 4 players in teams of two.
2) Each round has a trump suit chosen by the Hakem.
3) Players must follow suit when possible.
4) If a player cannot follow suit, they may play trump or any other card.
5) The team that wins most tricks wins the hand.

Hokm Terms (starter glossary).

Hakem: The player who chooses trump.
Trump (Hokm): The suit that can beat cards from other suits.
Trick: One set of four played cards, one per player.
Lead: The first card played in a trick.
Follow suit: Playing the same suit as the lead card when possible.
